notes: Behind an LlmProvider interface (Anthropic/other; key unused until AI endpoints go live). Powers voice transcript parsing (POST /voice/parse, debit 1 credit), insights (GET /insights/dashboard, debit 5), and risk scoring (GET /customers/:id/risk, debit 5). AI never controls critical/irreversible workflows; balances/scheduling/receipt-numbering stay traditional software. Stubbed in tests.
